business_administration_missing_courses.title: Business Finance
business_administration_missing_courses.description: Fundamental principles of corporate finance including financial analysis, capital budgeting, and financing decisions. Students learn to evaluate investment opportunities, manage working capital, and understand the relationship between risk and return in business contexts.
learning_objectives: Analyze financial statements and calculate key financial ratios
Evaluate capital budgeting decisions using NPV and IRR
Understand cost of capital and capital structure decisions
Assess working capital management strategies
Apply risk and return concepts to financial decision-making
covered_materials: Time value of money and present value calculations
Financial statement analysis and ratio analysis
Capital budgeting techniques and decision criteria
Cost of capital and weighted average cost of capital

business_administration_missing_courses.title: Operations Management
business_administration_missing_courses.description: Study of operations and production management including process design, capacity planning, inventory management, and quality control. Students learn to optimize operational efficiency and effectiveness in manufacturing and service organizations.
learning_objectives: Design efficient operational processes and workflows
Apply inventory management and control techniques
Implement quality management and continuous improvement practices
Analyze capacity planning and scheduling decisions
Evaluate supply chain management strategies

business_administration_missing_courses.title: Human Resource Management
business_administration_missing_courses.description: Comprehensive study of human resource management practices including recruitment, selection, training, performance management, and employee relations. Students learn to manage human capital effectively while understanding legal and ethical considerations in HR.
learning_objectives: Develop effective recruitment and selection strategies
Design training and development programs
Implement performance management systems
Understand employment law and compliance requirements
Apply compensation and benefits management principles
covered_materials: Diversity and inclusion in the workplace

business_administration_missing_courses.title: Strategic Management
business_administration_missing_courses.description: Capstone course integrating business knowledge to develop and implement organizational strategies. Students learn strategic analysis, formulation, and implementation while understanding competitive dynamics and strategic decision-making processes.
learning_objectives: Conduct comprehensive strategic analysis of organizations
Formulate competitive and corporate strategies
Evaluate strategic alternatives and implementation challenges
Understand industry analysis and competitive positioning
Apply strategic thinking to complex business problems

business_administration_missing_courses.title: International Business
business_administration_missing_courses.description: Exploration of business operations in the global marketplace including cultural, political, and economic factors affecting international trade and investment. Students learn to navigate international business challenges and opportunities.
learning_objectives: Understand global business environment and cultural differences
Analyze international trade theories and policies
Evaluate foreign market entry strategies
Assess international financial management issues
Develop global business strategies and operations
covered_materials: Foreign exchange markets and risk management
International business ethics and social responsibility
